decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id `project_first-second-ave-sbs-cb8-2010` already exists in the registry with the same source (`2010_02_25_brt_1st2nd_cb8`), matching project name 'First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service', identical project_type 'Select Bus Service', borough 'Manhattan', and description.
